extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE Julian won the 27.2km Pau time trial by 14 seconds over THOMAS Geraint, extending yellow jersey lead despite pre-race expectations favoring Thomas.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE faster in final kilometer despite Thomas dominating intermediate checks, suggesting puncheur advantage on 17% finish gradient.
DE GENDT Thomas set benchmark time early, stayed third all day, revealing late starters faded on technical course.
BARDET Romain lost 1:26 at intermediate check, bike change mid-TT hemorrhaged GC time, poor equipment decision under pressure.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Gained time in final kilometer over pure time trialists despite being slower at intermediate checks, revealing climbing punch over sustained power.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Fastest at intermediate but faded to line, losing 21 seconds to De Gendt and 14 to Alaphilippe suggests stamina issues on technical course.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Crashed heavily on right-hander clipping barriers, abandoned Tour with leg gash, revealing risk of aggressive cornering in TT.
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: negative: Fastest at intermediate but faded badly to 4th at finish, 9.6 seconds down, showing weakness on steep technical finale.
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: Solid 6th place after losing time in crosswinds stage, confirmed improved time trialing form as GC threat.
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Lost 1:50 after mid-race bike change tactical error, 1:26 down at intermediate already indicates poor pacing strategy.
